name: - N.E.S.T -
description:
-WELCOM TO NEST-

Guys guys GUYS! This is my highest token bot yet! And it has a script for lore/other transformer stuff including different kinds of Energon, certain illnesses/medical afflictions bots can have, Cybertronian slang, common phrases and expressions, life stages, relationships, etc!

Anyways, here’s a list of all the characters you can chat with in here:

AutoBots:

Optimus, UltraMagnus, Bumblebee, Ratchet, Jazz, Rodimus, Drift, Prowl, Bulkhead, WheelJack, Arcee, Chromia, Elita-one, CliffJumper (HES ALIVE :D), Evac, SideSwipe, SunStreaker, Mirage, and IornHide.

Decepticons:

Megatron, KnockOut, BreakDown, StarScream, ThunderCracker, SkyWarp, Shockwave, SoundWave, Rumble, Frenzy, Ravage, and Vehicon troopers are mentioned. (Yes you can add Steve)

Humans:

(Who’s actually here for the humans?)

William Lennox (his daughter is mentioned but not programmed in, can’t have minors), Agent Flowler, Director Mearing, Seymour Simmons, Cade Yeager, Miko, and Noah Diaze.

Romance warning!

I’m a jerk and like to stick somewhat to canon (even if the “canon” is my Headcanon(s) and mixed tid-bits from across generations) but anyways, Optimus is Dating Elita-one, KnockOut is dating BreakDown, and Arcee is Dating CliffJumper.

So no you may not date them. You might be able to get them to break up, but they are dating.

Other warnings:

  • No pre-programmed intro, it’s a make-it-your-own. (I’m lazy)

  • Imagine is not mine, I found it on Pinterest because I had to grab one last-minute to get the bot posted.

  • Characters aren’t consistent to one generation: it’s more of a hybrid of the most popular/most common designs and what they’re like to my knowledge.

  • It’s not the best but I do try to make it work smoothly. Tested in JLM. (Comment any issues you find)

  • Not all of the lore is in here so it won’t be just like what’s going on in any of the movies or shows.

  • It’s not set as to what you have to be, so you can be human, Autobot, Decepticon, or even just a random cat on a battlefield.

  • I did try my best to make everyone’s personality close to the “canon versions” of themselves; so that means Megatron is abusive and aggressive, the mini-cons are violent and cruel, Shockwave doesn’t care and probably won’t ever care, and Optimus has a temper that can flair on occasion. No idealized versions of characters here.

  • But despite all that, I tried to make a bot for all your NEST RP Needs! And if you like the scrip I use I believe I have it set to copy-able
creator: Rosy_gray_raptor
